cookies.title: Cookie Preferences
cookies.description: We use cookies to enhance your experience.
cookies.explanation: We use cookies and similar technologies to help personalize content, tailor and measure ads, and provide a better experience. By clicking 'Accept All', you agree to this use. Click 'Manage Preferences' to customize your choices.
cookies.necessaryDesc: Required for the website to function. Cannot be disabled.
cookies.analyticsDesc: Help us understand how visitors interact with our website.
cookies.marketingDesc: Used to track visitors across websites for advertising purposes.

hero.title: Complete platform for experience mapping
hero.subtitle: Your CX team's toolkit to stop guessing and start improving. Map emotional arcs, define archetypes, monitor health with NPS, CSAT, and CES — all in one collaborative studio.

landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to map customer journeys
landing.featuresSubtitle: Powerful tools to understand and improve every touchpoint
landing.pricingSubtitle: Choose the plan that fits your needs
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to transform your customer experience?
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of teams already using our platform

features.journeyMappingDesc: Visual canvas to map every step of your customer's experience
features.emotionalArcDesc: Track and visualize customer emotions throughout their journey
features.archetypesDesc: Define and manage different customer personas and their unique paths
features.collaborationDesc: Work together with your team in real-time with comments and presence
features.analyticsDesc: Data-driven insights to improve customer experience metrics
features.templatesDesc: Start quickly with pre-built templates for common scenarios

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Get started in minutes with our intuitive platform
howItWorks.step1Desc: Start with a template or create from scratch
howItWorks.step2Desc: Add stages, touchpoints, and emotional markers
howItWorks.step3Desc: Share with your team and refine together

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noJourneysDesc: Create your first customer journey to start mapping experiences and identifying opportunities.
dashboard.noActivityDesc: Activity will appear here as you work on journeys

journey.title: Journey Title
journey.ritualsDescription: Map recurring customer rituals and habitual behaviors at each stage of the journey. Identify patterns in how customers interact with your brand repeatedly.
journey.voiceDescription: Capture the customer's voice — verbatim quotes, sentiment patterns, tone analysis — mapped to journey stages.
journey.lingoDescription: Document the specific language, jargon, and terminology customers use at each stage, enabling teams to mirror customer language in communications.
journey.noJourneysDesc: Create your first journey to get started

touchpoint.addPainPointDesc: Describe a pain point or friction the customer experiences at this touchpoint.
touchpoint.addHighlightDesc: Describe a positive moment or delight the customer experiences at this touchpoint.
touchpoint.painPointPlaceholder: What frustrates the customer at this moment?
touchpoint.highlightPlaceholder: What delights the customer at this moment?

archetypes.title: Archetypes
archetypes.subtitle: Define and manage customer archetypes used across your journeys.
archetypes.noArchetypesDesc: Create your first customer archetype to better understand your users
archetypes.myArchetypesDesc: Archetypes you've created or imported for your organization.
archetypes.publicDesc: Community archetypes shared by other users.
archetypes.studioDesc: Premium archetypes curated by the Journey Studio team.

templates.title: Template Library
templates.subtitle: Start fast with industry-proven journey templates
templates.noTemplatesDesc: Try adjusting your search or filters

templates.describeJourneyPlaceholder: e.g., A new customer onboarding journey for a fintech mobile banking app...

sounds.title: Sound Settings
sounds.description: Configure audio feedback for actions and notifications
sounds.enableSoundsDesc: Play audio feedback throughout the app
sounds.successDesc: Play when actions complete successfully (saving, creating, exporting)
sounds.notificationDesc: Play for comments, mentions, and collaborator activity
sounds.actionDesc: Subtle sounds for clicks, tabs, and interactions
sounds.alertDesc: Play for errors, warnings, and important alerts
sounds.aiDesc: Play when AI generation starts or completes
sounds.accessibilityNote: Sounds respect your system's "Reduce Motion" accessibility setting. When enabled, no sounds will play.
